description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular brown briefcase with a hard shell exterior, adorned with a few colorful stickers including a red circular one and a white arrow. The surface shows some signs of wear, with minor scuffs and marks, suggesting frequent use. The front features a prominent metallic latch and a sturdy, curved black handle attached with metal brackets. The stitching along the edges is visible, adding to the durability and classic look of the case. The corners appear slightly worn but do not have additional protective reinforcements. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for carrying documents or personal items in an urban environment.
description: A brown, hard-shell briefcase with a black handle, metallic latch, and colorful stickers on its surface, showing signs of wear and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic latch, black handle, and visible stickers on the top surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the briefcase and the placement of stickers on the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge and the continuation of the top surface stickers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the edge stitching and sticker placement.
attribute_handle_type: Single curved handle, likely made of black plastic or leather, attached with metal brackets, fixed and non-retractable.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Single metallic latch located at the front center, standard clasp type, no visible combination or key lock.
